reason_not_scored: This video documents a training course (Computerised GI Endoscopy Simulator, Dry Lab, Upper GI Endoscopy Course) showing participants in a classroom/lab setting observing endoscopy simulator demonstrations. The content consists of wide-angle room shots, simulator screen views, and instructor interactions with trainees. This is educational/instructional material with narration overlay (text at bottom of frames), not a recorded performance of an FLS task by a single trainee that can be scored against the official rubric.
content_observed: Multiple participants standing in a training lab environment
GI endoscopy simulator displays showing anatomical views and tool manipulation
Instructor demonstrations on a computerised endoscopy trainer
Group learning context with no individual task performance timing
Educational overlays and captions identifying the course
scoring_not_applicable: No individual trainee performing a timed FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). The video is a documentary/educational recording of a simulator training course, not a scoreable performance video.
